0.title: Overview
0.text:
- Build focus: high DPS Minigun build
- Main idea: use Minigun for massive sustained damage and elemental damage
- Playstyle: stack movement speed, use Speedster for more DPS, and use Revolver to refill ammo when needed
- Strong because Minigun fires so many shots that it procs effects constantly and melts bosses very quickly

1.title: Primary Weapon: Minigun
1.text:
- Primary weapon: Minigun
- Stat priority: max Damage and Accuracy
- Put leftover points into Ammo Bag
- Why Damage: boosts the Minigun's already huge DPS
- Why Accuracy: helps more bullets hit weak spots and reduces wasted shots
- Key unique joker: Elemental Spin
- Alternative unique: Frenzy Spin, but it may waste too much ammo because fire rate gets extremely high
- Key jokers: Speedster, Bellshot, Run and Gun, Relentless
- Speedster gives more damage and fire rate from movement speed
- Bellshot is very strong because Minigun fires so many bullets and can spawn lots of healing ghost bells on weak spot hits
- Run and Gun adds movement speed, helping survivability and Speedster scaling
- Relentless is optional, mostly just a useful extra normal joker

2.title: Secondary Weapon: Revolver
2.text:
- Secondary weapon: Revolver
- Element: Electricity
- Main purpose: create ammo boxes and buff cactus summons
- Key joker: double Ammo Supply
- Why Ammo Supply: kills have a chance to drop ammo boxes, solving the Minigun's ammo problem
- Swap to Revolver, kill a few enemies, then collect ammo boxes to refill Minigun
- Electricity damage is used to shoot cactus spells and buff them
- Shooting Bandido with electricity makes him move and attack faster
- Extra joker option: Headbang for better Revolver damage
- Lifesteal and damage are also useful so Revolver can heal, kill, and farm ammo at the same time

3.title: Spells
3.text:
- Spells used: Pistol, Bandido, and Thunder Strike
- Thunder Strike is the main horde-clear spell
- It can wipe huge groups with one button press
- Pistol and Bandido add extra damage and help in clutch situations
- Cactus summons work well with the electric Revolver because electricity buffs their speed/attack rate
- Battle Mage helps reset spell cooldowns quickly, so you can cast more often

4.title: Character
4.text:
- Main stat priority: max Movement Speed
- Why Movement Speed: gives survivability and boosts Speedster damage/fire rate
- Character jokers: Second Wind, double Speedy Gonzalez, Disgrace, Battle Mage
- Second Wind is a strong solo safety card
- Speedy Gonzalez gives extra movement speed for Speedster scaling
- Disgrace gives more movement speed and is worth losing the horse for combat
- Battle Mage reduces spell cooldowns on kills and is extremely strong, especially on Nightmare
- Stack as much movement speed as possible because it increases both damage and survivability

5.title: Strategy and Run Tips
5.text:
- Aim for weak spots because Bellshot only procs healing ghost bells from weak spot hits
- Use Minigun for bosses, elites, danger zone hordes, and high-DPS situations
- Watch ammo, but do not panic: use Revolver kills and map ammo boxes to refill
- Learn chest and ammo box locations because map knowledge makes Minigun ammo much easier to manage
- Use Thunder Strike on massive hordes for instant clearing
- Cast Pistol and Bandido often because Battle Mage helps reduce cooldowns through kills
- Shoot cactus summons with electric Revolver to buff them
- Be careful with too much fire rate because it can burn through ammo very quickly
- Movement speed can get very high, so control your movement carefully, especially on snow or slippery terrain
- Avoid nukers and storm traps; moving too fast can make you slide into danger
- For full clears, do main objectives, side objectives, danger zone hordes, ghost houses, and collect useful jokers along the way
